NORTH_AMERICA = frozenset({"US", "CA", "MX"})
EUROPE = frozenset({"GB", "FR", "DE", "IT", "ES"})
ASIA = frozenset({"JP", "CN", "KR"})
VALID_STATUSES = frozenset({"active", "pending", "suspended"})
HIGH_PRIORITY = frozenset({"critical", "high"})
LOW_PRIORITY = frozenset({"low", "none"})
CURRENCY_SYMBOLS = frozenset({"USD", "CAD", "AUD"})

def classify_region(country_code):
    if country_code in NORTH_AMERICA:
        return "north_america"
    elif country_code in EUROPE:
        return "europe"
    elif country_code in ASIA:
        return "asia"
    return "other"

def is_valid_status(status):
    return status in VALID_STATUSES

def get_priority_color(priority):
    if priority in HIGH_PRIORITY:
        return "red"
    elif priority == "medium":
        return "yellow"
    elif priority in LOW_PRIORITY:
        return "green"
    return "gray"

def format_currency(amount, currency):
    if currency in CURRENCY_SYMBOLS:
        return f"${amount:.2f}"
    return f"{amount:.2f} {currency}"
